finding.summary: Track output is hot against the digital ceiling: true peak reaches +0.8 dB and sample peak +0.2 dB, leaving essentially no headroom before downstream conversion or limiting.
finding.probable_cause: The chain has no inserts (fx_chain empty) and the track sits at unity gain (track.volume_db 0.0) with no dynamics processing to control intersample peaks; the signal arrives already near full scale.
finding.confidence_reason: True peak and sample peak are directly measured; the causal claim that absence of processing is the cause is inferred because no FX parameters are reported to inspect.

evidence_refs.description: Sample peak +0.2 dB, sitting at the digital ceiling.
Track volume 0.0 dB, no attenuation at output.
Empty FX chain — no insert processing to manage level.

proposal.reason: Preview changing track volume from 0.000 dB to -2.000 dB to test whether true_peak_db decreases.
